title: Amtech G2300 100mm (4") Bolster Chisel
features: TOUGH: This bolster chisel is made from tough, induction hardened steel and is ideal for general brick work
COMFORTABLE TO USE: The octagonal shaft has a rubber guard and comfortable grip for a positive hold
SIZE CAPACITY: 4 inch / 100 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains 1x Bolster See more
